notes: Comprehensive PMC review: NAC mechanisms, glutathione synthesis, medical applications (acetaminophen overdose, mucolytic), antioxidant and psychiatric evidence
2024 meta-analysis: NAC significantly reduces muscle soreness, lactate, IL-6, and TBARS after exercise; elevates glutathione; supports exercise recovery section
2022 Frontiers in Aging RCT (healthy older adults): GlyNAC corrects GSH deficiency, reduces oxidative stress and inflammation, improves strength, cognition, and body composition
Examine.com overview: dosing, safety, mechanisms, and evidence summary across antioxidant, respiratory, and psychiatric applications; regularly updated
